name: Jamil
description:
Jamil was the Slave Owner of Morgiana and Goltas. Jamil was the chief of Qishan.

~!Jamil was a very cruel and arrogant person. He thought of himself as a king candidate and disrespected everyone else. He also took a lot of pleasure in torturing Morgiana. He was also shown as very cowardly, when he was defeated by Alibaba in battle and starting calling Morgiana and Goltas for help.!~ (Source: Magi Wikia)
